query:
UPDATE games 
SET publishedModel = 1
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' 
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-19'
  AND modelTotal IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) as published FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND publishedModel = 1;
